title: Demonstrators and Product Promoters
description: Demonstrate merchandise and answer questions for the purpose of creating public interest in buying the product. May sell demonstrated merchandise.

tasks.text: Provide product samples, coupons, informational brochures, or other incentives to persuade people to buy products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell products being promoted and keep records of sales.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Keep areas neat while working and return items to correct locations following demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate or explain products, methods, or services to persuade customers to purchase products or use services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record and report demonstration-related information, such as the number of questions asked by the audience or the number of coupons distributed.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Suggest specific product purchases to meet customers' needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research or investigate products to be presented to prepare for demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set up and arrange displays or demonstration areas to attract the attention of prospective customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify interested and qualified customers to provide them with additional information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit trade shows, stores, community organizations, or other venues to demonstrate products or services or to answer questions from potential customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport, assemble, and disassemble materials used in presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Practice demonstrations to ensure that they will run smoothly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Learn about competitors' products or consumers' interests or concerns to answer questions or provide more complete information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct customers in alteration of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Work as part of a team of demonstrators to accommodate large crowds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or alter presentation contents to target specific audiences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock shelves with products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide product information, using lectures, films, charts, or slide shows.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train demonstrators to present a company's products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend product or service improvements to employers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Wear costumes or sign boards and walk in public to promote merchandise, services, or events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
